meaning: To move completed or historical data to a separate, long-term storage location without deleting it (strong alternative to 'hide old files' or 'save in a safe place').
definition: To store old messages or files in a separate space to keep active areas organized.
example: Instead of deleting old project folders, we archive them to keep the workspace organized.
exampleHindi: पुराने प्रोजेक्ट फ़ोल्डरों को हटाने के बजाय, हम कार्यक्षेत्र को व्यवस्थित रखने के लिए उन्हें संग्रहीत करते हैं।

meaning: To temporarily hold data in computer memory while transferring it from one place to another, preventing interruptions (strong alternative to 'load ahead of time' or 'hold data').
definition: To temporarily hold data in computer memory while transferring it from one place to another, preventing interruptions (strong alternative to 'load ahead of time' or 'hold data').
example: The video player will buffer a few seconds of video to ensure smooth playback.
exampleHindi: सुचारू प्लेबैक सुनिश्चित करने के लिए वीडियो प्लेयर कुछ सेकंड के वीडियो को बफर करेगा।

meaning: To make a complete, identical copy of a software project, repository, or virtual environment (strong alternative to 'copy a whole setup' or 'make a twin').
definition: To make a complete, identical copy of a software project, repository, or virtual environment (strong alternative to 'copy a whole setup' or 'make a twin').
example: Developers need to clone the repository to their local machines to begin coding.
exampleHindi: कोडिंग शुरू करने के लिए डेवलपर्स को रिपॉजिटरी को अपनी स्थानीय मशीनों पर क्लोन करना होगा।

meaning: To reduce the file size of data or media using an algorithm, making it easier to send or store (strong alternative to 'make file size smaller' or 'zip a file').
definition: To reduce the file size of data or media using an algorithm, making it easier to send or store (strong alternative to 'make file size smaller' or 'zip a file').
example: You should compress the high-resolution images before uploading them to the web server.
exampleHindi: आपको उच्च-रिज़ॉल्यूशन छवियों को वेब सर्वर पर अपलोड करने से पहले संपीड़ित करना चाहिए।

meaning: To combine multiple sources of data, files, or information into a single, unified database or report (strong alternative to 'put spreadsheets together' or 'combine data').
definition: To make something physically stronger or more solid; to combine into a single more effective unit.
example: We will consolidate all customer feedback spreadsheets into one central database.
exampleHindi: हम सभी ग्राहक फीडबैक स्प्रेडशीट को एक केंद्रीय डेटाबेस में समेकित करेंगे।

meaning: To unpack a compressed file or archive back into its original size and format (strong alternative to 'unzip' or 'make file normal size').
definition: To unpack a compressed file or archive back into its original size and format (strong alternative to 'unzip' or 'make file normal size').
example: The utility will decompress the backup files automatically during restoration.
exampleHindi: पुनर्स्थापना के दौरान उपयोगिता स्वचालित रूप से बैकअप फ़ाइलों को डीकंप्रेस कर देगी।

meaning: To create an exact replica of a file, folder, or database record in the same directory or system (strong alternative to 'copy-paste' or 'make a copy').
definition: To create an exact replica of a file, folder, or database record in the same directory or system (strong alternative to 'copy-paste' or 'make a copy').
example: Please duplicate the template folder before you begin customizing it for the new client.
exampleHindi: नए क्लाइंट के लिए इसे अनुकूलित करना शुरू करने से पहले कृपया टेम्पलेट फ़ोल्डर की डुप्लिकेट बनाएं।

meaning: To convert and transfer data from a software application into a file format compatible with other software (strong alternative to 'save file as something else' or 'send data out').
definition: To convert and transfer data from a software application into a file format compatible with other software (strong alternative to 'save file as something else' or 'send data out').
example: Once you finish editing the spreadsheet, export it as a PDF to share with the client.
exampleHindi: एक बार जब आप स्प्रेडशीट का संपादन समाप्त कर लें, तो इसे क्लाइंट के साथ साझा करने के लिए पीडीएफ के रूप में निर्यात करें।

meaning: To retrieve and decompress specific files from a compressed archive, or to pull specific data from a database (strong alternative to 'unzip' or 'pull out data').
definition: To retrieve and decompress specific files from a compressed archive, or to pull specific data from a database (strong alternative to 'unzip' or 'pull out data').
example: First extract the ZIP folder to your desktop, then run the installer.
exampleHindi: सबसे पहले ज़िप फ़ोल्डर को अपने डेस्कटॉप पर निकालें, फिर इंस्टॉलर चलाएँ।

meaning: To narrow down a list of data or search results by applying specific conditions or criteria (strong alternative to 'narrow down search' or 'sort out').
definition: An effect applied to an image or video to alter its appearance.
example: You can filter the customer list to show only those who bought a product in the last month.
exampleHindi: आप केवल उन लोगों को दिखाने के लिए ग्राहक सूची फ़िल्टर कर सकते हैं जिन्होंने पिछले महीने कोई उत्पाद खरीदा था।

meaning: To transfer data from an external file or format into a software application (strong alternative to 'bring data in' or 'load a file').
definition: To transfer data from an external file or format into a software application (strong alternative to 'bring data in' or 'load a file').
example: You can import your contact list directly from a CSV file into the CRM system.
exampleHindi: आप अपनी संपर्क सूची को CSV फ़ाइल से सीधे CRM सिस्टम में आयात कर सकते हैं।

meaning: To organize and catalog database records or web pages to optimize search speed and retrieval efficiency (strong alternative to 'make database search fast' or 'make a search list').
definition: To organize and catalog database records or web pages to optimize search speed and retrieval efficiency (strong alternative to 'make database search fast' or 'make a search list').
example: Search engines index new web pages so they can be retrieved quickly by searchers.
exampleHindi: खोज इंजन नए वेब पेजों को अनुक्रमित करते हैं ताकि खोजकर्ताओं द्वारा उन्हें शीघ्रता से पुनर्प्राप्त किया जा सके।

meaning: To import and absorb large datasets into a database or data warehouse for processing and analysis (strong alternative to 'bring lots of data in' or 'load huge files').
definition: To import and absorb large datasets into a database or data warehouse for processing and analysis (strong alternative to 'bring lots of data in' or 'load huge files').
example: The analytics platform is designed to ingest millions of data points per second.
exampleHindi: एनालिटिक्स प्लेटफ़ॉर्म को प्रति सेकंड लाखों डेटा पॉइंट ग्रहण करने के लिए डिज़ाइन किया गया है।

meaning: To link database fields or values from one system to corresponding fields in another system (strong alternative to 'match up lists' or 'connect fields').
definition: A diagrammatic representation of an area of land or sea.
example: You need to map the customer name field in the CSV file to the CRM's name field.
exampleHindi: आपको CSV फ़ाइल में ग्राहक नाम फ़ील्ड को CRM के नाम फ़ील्ड में मैप करना होगा।

meaning: To move data, applications, or entire operating environments from one platform, server, or system to another (strong alternative to 'move files over' or 'transfer databases').
definition: To move data, applications, or entire operating environments from one platform, server, or system to another (strong alternative to 'move files over' or 'transfer databases').
example: The company plans to migrate its local database to the cloud next month.
exampleHindi: कंपनी की योजना अगले महीने अपने स्थानीय डेटाबेस को क्लाउड पर स्थानांतरित करने की है।

meaning: To write new data over existing data, completely replacing the old file or database record (strong alternative to 'save on top of' or 'replace old file').
definition: To write new data over existing data, completely replacing the old file or database record (strong alternative to 'save on top of' or 'replace old file').
example: Be careful not to overwrite the original document with your changes.
exampleHindi: सावधान रहें कि अपने परिवर्तनों के साथ मूल दस्तावेज़ को अधिलेखित न करें।

meaning: To analyze a string of code, file, or text by breaking it down into component parts to understand its structure (strong alternative to 'read through text' or 'look through code').
definition: To analyze a string of code, file, or text by breaking it down into component parts to understand its structure (strong alternative to 'read through text' or 'look through code').
example: The script will parse the raw JSON data and display it in a user-friendly table.
exampleHindi: स्क्रिप्ट कच्चे JSON डेटा को पार्स करेगी और इसे उपयोगकर्ता के अनुकूल तालिका में प्रदर्शित करेगी।

meaning: To divide a storage drive or large database into distinct, independent sections for better management (strong alternative to 'split a drive' or 'cut database in half').
definition: To divide a storage drive or large database into distinct, independent sections for better management (strong alternative to 'split a drive' or 'cut database in half').
example: We will partition the hard drive to separate the operating system from personal files.
exampleHindi: हम ऑपरेटिंग सिस्टम को व्यक्तिगत फ़ाइलों से अलग करने के लिए हार्ड ड्राइव का विभाजन करेंगे।

meaning: To permanently and irreversibly remove unwanted data, files, or database records to free up space (strong alternative to 'delete completely' or 'wipe out').
definition: To permanently and irreversibly remove unwanted data, files, or database records to free up space (strong alternative to 'delete completely' or 'wipe out').
example: The system is configured to purge deleted emails after thirty days.
exampleHindi: सिस्टम को तीस दिनों के बाद हटाए गए ईमेल को शुद्ध करने के लिए कॉन्फ़िगर किया गया है।

meaning: A formal request for specific information from a database using structured commands (strong alternative to 'search database' or 'ask database for info').
definition: A formal request for specific information from a database using structured commands (strong alternative to 'search database' or 'ask database for info').
example: You can run a SQL query to find out how many users signed up last month.
exampleHindi: आप यह जानने के लिए SQL क्वेरी चला सकते हैं कि पिछले महीने कितने उपयोगकर्ताओं ने साइन अप किया था।

meaning: To continuously copy and synchronize database changes across multiple servers to ensure high availability (strong alternative to 'copy databases automatically').
definition: To copy, reproduce, or repeat an experiment to verify results (replaces the conversational 'do again' or 'copy').
example: The system replicates data across three separate server locations to prevent downtime.
exampleHindi: सिस्टम डाउनटाइम को रोकने के लिए तीन अलग-अलग सर्वर स्थानों पर डेटा की प्रतिकृति बनाता है।

meaning: To search for and successfully recall specific data or files from a storage system or database (strong alternative to 'find a file' or 'search and get').
definition: To search for and successfully recall specific data or files from a storage system or database (strong alternative to 'find a file' or 'search and get').
example: The search tool makes it easy to retrieve documents using keywords.
exampleHindi: खोज उपकरण कीवर्ड का उपयोग करके दस्तावेज़ पुनर्प्राप्त करना आसान बनाता है।

meaning: To arrange data, files, or records in a specific alphabetical, numerical, or chronological order (strong alternative to 'put in order' or 'line up').
definition: To arrange data, files, or records in a specific alphabetical, numerical, or chronological order (strong alternative to 'put in order' or 'line up').
example: You can sort the files by date modified to find the most recent ones.
exampleHindi: आप नवीनतम फ़ाइलों को खोजने के लिए संशोधित तिथि के अनुसार फ़ाइलों को क्रमबद्ध कर सकते हैं।

meaning: To shorten a data string or file by cutting off its end after a specific limit (strong alternative to 'cut off' or 'shorten').
definition: To shorten a data string or file by cutting off its end after a specific limit (strong alternative to 'cut off' or 'shorten').
example: The system will truncate usernames that exceed fifteen characters.
exampleHindi: सिस्टम पन्द्रह अक्षरों से अधिक वाले उपयोक्तानामों को काट देगा।
